issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnBlock' only if the card blocks. Text says '[Your Turn] When this Character becomes rested' — this is a resting trigger, not a block trigger. Should be a custom trigger or OnRest if available; 'OnBlock' is incorrect.

Action type is 'Rest' but the effect prevents opponent's Characters from being rested. Should be a prevention/restriction mechanic, not Rest action. The card does not rest opponent characters; it prevents them from being rested.
Missing duration field. Text specifies 'until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' — this is a conditional timed duration, not permanent or EndOfTurn. Needs explicit duration handling.
Trigger 'OnAttacked' is incorrect. Text says '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' — should be 'OnAttack' (opponent attacks you), not 'OnAttacked'. This is when opponent attacks, triggering your response.
TrashFromHand action should be conditional (optional 'You may trash'). Current DSL does not indicate this is optional. Should use 'optional':true or 'mayActivate':true.
Missing '[Once Per Turn]' condition. Should include condition type 'OncePerTurn' or similar frequency restriction.

'thenActions' is empty array but PowerBoost is listed as separate action. The power boost should be conditional on trashing — it should be in 'thenActions' of the trash action, not a separate sequential action.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Your Turn] When this Character becomes rested, up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 9 or less cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.
[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle.
